outputs.main.sas:
# Load required libraries
library(Tplyr)
library(rtf)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

# Function to generate 14-1.01: Screening Summary
generate_screening_summary <- function(adsl_path, output_path) {
  
  # Read ADSL dataset
  adsl <- readr::read_csv(adsl_path)
  
  # Filter to All Screened population
  # Assuming SAFFL is the flag for screened subjects (1 = screened)
  screened_adsl <- adsl %>% 
    filter(SAFFL == "Y")
  
  # Create Tplyr table
  t <- tplyr_table(screened_adsl, TRT01P) %>%
    add_treat_grps(
      "Placebo" = "Placebo",
      "Xanomeline Low" = "Xanomeline Low Dose",
      "Xanomeline High" = "Xanomeline High Dose"
    ) %>%
    set_pop_data(adsl) %>%
    set_pop_treat_var(TRT01P) %>%
    set_distinct_by(USUBJID) %>%
    set_format_strings(
      n = "xx (xx.x%)"
    )
  
  # Add screening counts section
  t <- t %>%
    add_layer(
      group_count("USUBJID", 
                  by = "Screened",
                  where = SAFFL == "Y",
                  denom = "All Screened",
                  denom_where = SAFFL == "Y")
    )
  
  # Add screen failure reasons section
  # Assuming SCRSREAS contains screen failure reasons
  if ("SCRSREAS" %in% names(screened_adsl)) {
    t <- t %>%
      add_layer(
        group_count("USUBJID", 
                    by = "SCRSREAS",
                    where = SAFFL == "Y" & !is.na(SCRSREAS),
                    denom = "All Screened",
                    denom_where = SAFFL == "Y")
      )
  }
  
  # Add enrollment summary section
  # Assuming ENRLFL is the flag for enrolled subjects
  t <- t %>%
    add_layer(
      group_count("USUBJID", 
                  by = "Enrolled",
                  where = ENRLFL == "Y",
                  denom = "All Screened",
                  denom_where = SAFFL == "Y")
    )
  
  # Build the table
  tbl <- build(t)
  
  # Format the table for output
  formatted_tbl <- tbl %>%
    mutate(
      row_label = ifelse(is.na(row_label), "Total", row_label)
    )
  
  # Create RTF document
  doc <- rtf_doc() %>%
    rtf_section(
      rtf_table(formatted_tbl,
                width = 8.5,
                borders = c("top", "bottom", "left", "right"),
                col_widths = c(3.5, 1.5, 1.5, 1.5))
    )
  
  # Add table title
  doc <- doc %>%
    rtf_section(
      rtf_paragraph("Table 14-1.01: Screening Summary",
                    format = text_format(bold = TRUE, font_size = 12))
    )
  
  # Write RTF file
  write_rtf(doc, output_path)
  
  # Return the table for inspection
  return(formatted_tbl)
}

# Example usage
# generate_screening_summary("path/to/adsl.csv", "table_14-1-01_screening_summary.rtf")
